name: dry-clean-pickup-schedule
description: Create a simple dry-cleaning pickup tracker and bag tag note template for dropped-off garments, pickup dates, special notes, and reminder text, without handling payments, disputes, or accounts.
safety: Scheduling tracker only. Do not handle payments, refunds, billing disputes, damage claims, missing-item disputes, account logins, loyalty credentials, legal claims, or external communication with the cleaner. Keep notes neutral and practical.
